news.title: Lilly reneges on remainder of Rigel deal in another blow for RIPK1 inhibitors
news.snippet: Just a few months after ripping up the central nervous system-focused portion of its RIPK1 deal with Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Eli Lilly has now thrown out the rest of the pact, too.

news.title: Merck goes with Google for AI push, striking enterprise partnership worth up to $1B
news.snippet: Amid industry layoffs and M&A headlines, Big Pharma's embrace of AI is gaining more steam.

news.title: AACR: NCI leader Letai battles ‘misinformation’ to assure anxious researchers that ‘funding is strong’
news.snippet: NCI Director Letai envisions a return to normalcy for cancer research funding after last year's turmoil.

news.title: AcuityMD raises $80M to help bolster AI in the medtech industry
news.snippet: AcuityMD has raised $80 million—with a company valuation now nearing $1 billion—to use its artificial intelligence (AI) platform to boost multiple aspects of how medtech companies operate.

news.title: McKesson swaps minority stake in surgical unit to Apollo Funds for $1.25B
news.snippet: McKesson has let go of a minority share of its medical/surgical solutions division for $1.25 billion to Apollo Funds as part of the healthcare service giant’s plan to take the unit public next year.

news.title: Novartis narrows focus for anticoagulant after failure to best Eliquis in phase 3 trial
news.snippet: A little over a year after reabsorbing its anticoagulant abelacimab, Novartis has now terminated two phase 3 trials for the antibody.

news.title: Roche unpacks death imbalance, secondary endpoints in phase 3 multiple sclerosis trials

news.title: Racing toward first FDA nod for autoimmune CAR-T, Kyverna bolsters lead with full SPS dataset

news.title: Pfizer's strategy head Andrew Baum to step down following brief tenure: reports
news.snippet: Pfizer's chief strategy and innovation officer Andrew Baum is stepping down merely two years into the role, according to reports.

news.title: Tortugas comes out of its shell with $106M to fund 4 phase 2-stage neuro drugs licensed from Asia
news.snippet: A pair of Sage veterans has launched a neurology-focused startup armed with $106 million and a clinical-stage pipeline of assets licensed from Eisai and Hansoh.

news.title: Ray Therapeutics shines a light on $125M round targeting genetic eye therapy
news.snippet: Gene therapy biotech Ray Therapeutics has announced the closing of a $125 million series B financing to support the company’s vision restoration candidates for patients with retinal degeneration.

news.title: In a Merck Litespark shocker, Welireg triplet misses the mark in first-line kidney cancer
news.snippet: After prevailing in two kidney cancer trials in the refractory and early-stage settings, Merck & Co.’s blockbuster prospect Welireg surprisingly failed to ignite hope as a first-line treatment.

news.title: AbbVie to establish NC production base with $1.4B investment, creating 730-plus jobs
news.snippet: Like with many other pharma giants, AbbVie's manufacturing expansion will see the company put down roots in North Carolina.

news.title: CMS delays Part D GLP-1 model amid skepticism from insurers
news.snippet: The Trump administration is delaying a voluntary model that aimed to expand access to GLP-1s in Part D after pushback from insurers.

news.title: Samsung Biologics posts massive revenue growth as labor union rally sets strike in motion
news.snippet: As Samsung Biologics presented a massive quarterly revenue growth, 2,200 people rallied ahead of a planned labor union strike.

news.snippet: Pfizer's chief strategy and innovation officer Andrew Baum is stepping down merely two years into the role, according to reports.

news.title: AstraZeneca eyes 5th Ultomiris indication after kidney disease trial win
news.snippet: In a phase 3 trial in the rare kidney disease IgAN, AstraZeneca said its Ultomiris delivered a clinically meaningful and statistically significant reduction in protein from the urine after 34 weeks.

news.title: Opinion: Behind every miracle drug is a story

news.title: Are MAHA snacks really better for you? Nutrition experts parse a grocery aisle gold rush
news.snippet: From protein Pop-Tarts to avocado-oil chips, a MAHA-fueled snack revolution promises healthier eating. Experts say it may mostly be illusion.

news.title: Mental health support to be offered to people with diabetes in UK first

news.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines

news.title: Breakthrough £90,000 Alzheimer's drugs unlikely to benefit patients, report suggests
news.snippet: A major review has provoked a backlash after concluding the medicines provide too little benefit to be noticed.

news.title: What is the UK Covid inquiry and how does it work?
news.snippet: The fourth report from the inquiry into the pandemic said the vaccine roll-out was an "extraordinary feat".
